description_long: This is a reddish-brown crab with a broad, slightly domed carapace and two prominent claws, one of which is noticeably larger than the other. The crab's body is covered in a hard, glossy exoskeleton with visible segmentation and fine surface texture, especially on the legs and claws. Its eight walking legs are slender and jointed, with small spines and hairs visible along their length, giving a slightly rough appearance. The eyes are set on short stalks at the front corners of the carapace, and the mouthparts are tucked beneath the front edge. The claws are robust and curved, with the larger claw displaying a pronounced pincer. The overall coloration is a mix of deep orange, reddish-brown, and lighter beige highlights, with subtle color variation across the shell and limbs.
description: A reddish-brown crab with a domed carapace, two large claws, and eight spiny, jointed legs. Its glossy shell and detailed limbs show natural segmentation and color variation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both claws, and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large claw, the curvature of the carapace, and the segmentation of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, the attachment points of the legs, and the overall width of the crab.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the smaller claw and the detailed structure of the walking legs.
